remember: Explain the significance of a constitution in a country's governance.
Mention the various features of the Indian Constitution.
List the key principles of the Constitution of India.
Describe the Preamble to the Indian Constitution.
Identify the various amendments made to the Indian Constitution.
understand: Explain the concept of sovereignty and its relation to the Constitution.
Describe the relationship between the Constitution and the people.
Analyze the role of the Constitution in ensuring social justice.
Explain the importance of democracy in the Indian Constitution.
Discuss the concept of Fundamental Rights and how they are protected.
apply: Apply the principles of the Constitution to real-life scenarios.
Use the Constitution to evaluate the role of the government in a country.
Analyze the impact of the Constitution on social and economic policies.
Apply the concept of federalism to the Indian Constitution.
Evaluate the role of the Constitution in ensuring the rule of law.
analyze: Analyze the historical context of the Indian Constitution.
Examine the role of the Constitution in promoting national integration.
Analyze the impact of the Constitution on the social and economic development of India.
Evaluate the effectiveness of the Constitution in ensuring social justice.
Analyze the relationship between the Constitution and the judiciary.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, the students will be able to understand the significance of a constitution and its various features.
Students will be able to explain the concept of sovereignty and its relation to the Constitution.
Students will be able to describe the relationship between the Constitution and the people.
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests the understanding of the concept of sovereignty and its relation to the Constitution.
CBSE evaluates the student's ability to describe the relationship between the Constitution and the people.
CBSE tests the student's knowledge of the various amendments made to the Indian Constitution.
CBSE evaluates the student's ability to apply the principles of the Constitution to real-life scenarios.
